source_ref.subject: PR #305 merge commit 28676df runtime subject
source_ref.source_authority_caveat: API and worker images and OCI labels were read back at 28676df, but the 211 repo-local source marker still read decf33a. This capture is not G0 source-authority closure or gate-closable evidence.

notes: This reviewed, redacted summary records 28676df Admin Runtime capacity visibility after API/worker rollout and sandbox executor image override.

The evidence remains fail-closed because sandbox is treated as a missing Admin Runtime section, all seven recorded load-test gates are missing, and no b3_10x4_sdk_subagents profile evidence is attached.

A same-run G7 hardening verifier attempt did not produce passing G7 evidence because host Python lacked pydantic; later dependency-safe diagnosis exposed an executor workspace ownership blocker under cap_drop ALL. These diagnostics are tracked in status docs only and are not wrapped as reviewed G7 pass evidence.
open_followups: Reconcile the 211 repo-local source marker and source snapshot from decf33a to the runtime subject before any source-authority closure claim.
Merge and deploy the workspace-owner executor fix, then run a dependency-safe G7 hardening verifier path for the deployed runtime image before claiming current-main G7 211 verification.
Record operator-reviewed load-test evidence for all seven B3 gates.
Record b3_10x4_sdk_subagents profile evidence for 10 sessions x peak 4 SDK subagents per session before any production default increase.
